hooks.command: case "$PWD" in /Users/dan/Github/orpheus|/Users/dan/Github/orpheus/*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *) [ -f ../orpheus-graphify/orpheus/graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: knowledge graph at ../orpheus-graphify/orpheus/graphify-out/. For focused questions, run `graphify query \"<question>\" --out ../orpheus-graphify/orpheus/graphify-out` (scoped subgraph, usually much smaller than GRAPH_REPORT.md) instead of grepping raw files. Read ../orpheus-graphify/orpheus/graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md only for broad architecture context."}}' || true ;; esac
